title: Is Taylor Swift overrated?
author: katea
paragraphs: Most people would say yes. Kanye said he made her famous. [citation needed]. It is also said that the inventor of zero intvented it accidentally when trying to rate her albums.[citation also needed].
Ultimately it's up to the reader.
